description.ko: 보이지 않는 리듬이 빠르고 미니멀한 주파수 곡선으로 드러나며, 드문 위상 표식과 떨리는 선으로 공명을 보여준다.
description.en: Invisible rhythm becomes fast, minimal frequency loops, revealing resonance through sparse phase marks and vibrating lines.

prompt: ECHO-0 sound visualization rendered as a silent Lissajous calibration chamber made only of floating measurement marks and reactive hairlines, viewed in a clean orthographic front view against warm off-white negative space. Invisible sound pulls ultra-thin #4169E1 royal-blue frequency paths into tight figure-eight loops, then snaps them into fast #FF4500 orange angular cut marks at each transient beat. Sparse #FFD700 gold phase dots appear only where opposing loops lock into consonance, while rare #32CD32 lime-green tick bars hover at the outer timing limits like syncopated pitch changes. No speaker, performer, instrument, humanoid, core, sphere, dark void, corridor, membrane, glass pane, ice slab, tile grid, ribbon array, vellum map, abacus, circuit chip, or architectural structure appears; the image is pure vibrating line behavior reacting to unheard sound. Crisp micro-shadows beneath lifted strokes, low particle count, rhythmic asymmetry, fast visual tempo, minimal high-contrast geometry, resonance in silence made visible.
